hints.text: Gen4 = **red & white pickup trucks** (well blurred); Gen3 = white car w/ long antenna

shared_with.note: White long-antenna Gen3 car exists there too.
shared_with.diff: Trees Ôćĺ Sweden; treeless volcanic land Ôćĺ Iceland.

hints.text: Plates fully white w/ blue characters, **no EU strip**
**Yellow bollards w/ white reflector** ÔÇö on almost every rural road
**Barren & treeless**, dark grey volcanic soil ÔÇö looks like nowhere else in Northern Europe; geothermal lakes, lava fields, rifts, rock towers
Direction signs **yellow** w/ white road-number inset (dashed border = nearby road, not yours; farm signs blue/white)
Pedestrian signs: 4 stripes on a **yellow background** ÔÇö Europe's only yellow ped signs

shared_with.diff: ├ż Ôćĺ Icelandic only; grass-roofs + tunnels Ôćĺ Faroes.

hints.text: Street signs white/black w/ thin metal rim on lampposts; **all-white road lines** (yellow lines Ôćĺ think Norway/Finland); chevrons black w/ yellow arrows (NO/FI similar); signs w/ yellow background (like SE/FI)
Sparse coverage (densest SW; few interior roads); **road numbers**: ring road = 1; first digit regional, **2 (south) Ôćĺ 9 clockwise**

**Westfjords** = narrow fjords + flat-topped mountains; **east fjords** = larger, more jagged peaks; valleys west of Akureyri face N/NE between snowy peaks; inland = dark volcanic gravel deserts (mostly east); SW = flat farmland w/ distant mountains; Ei├░ar valley = hilly farms + snowy peaks both sides; Hallormssta├░ur = NE-SW valley w/ river + **unusually many trees**; Selfoss = lone flat-ridge mountain
**Reykjav├şk** = the only 'big city' feel, flat on a bay's south side; **Akureyri** = 2nd city in a N-S valley w/ mountains east AND west
**Pickup colour splits the country**: red = southwest, white = northeast

**Spotlights**: Vatnaj├Âkull glaciers visible from the southern ring road; only a handful of divided/3+-lane highways (mapped); **Heimaey** = ragged cliffs over Vestmannaeyjab├Žr; very foggy coverage Ôćĺ Bakkager├░i (NE)
